login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Pick up where you left off.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start free in under two minutes
signup.name: Name

oauth.missingCode: Sign-in did not complete — please try again

magicLink.title: Email me a magic link
magicLink.subtitle: We'll send a sign-in link to your inbox — no password required.
magicLink.success: Check your inbox — we sent a sign-in link that expires in 1 hour.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.subtitleWithEmail: We sent a verification link to {email}.
verifyEmail.subtitleGeneric: We sent a verification link to your email.
verifyEmail.info: Click the link in the email to activate your account. The link expires in 24 hours.
verifyEmail.didntGetIt: Didn't get it? Check your spam folder, then request a new one below.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll email you a reset link
forgotPassword.sentSubtitle: Check your inbox for the reset link

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a password you haven't used before.
resetPassword.expired: Your reset link has expired or wasn't recognized. Request a new one from Forgot password.

acceptInvite.title: Join your team
acceptInvite.subtitle: Accept your invitation to Second Star Technologies
acceptInvite.body: You've been invited to a Second Star Technologies workspace. Accept below and we'll take you straight in.
acceptInvite.invalidOrExpired: This invite is invalid, expired, or addressed to a different email. Ask the org admin to resend.
acceptInvite.updateFailed: Membership created but invite update failed: {message}

errors.accountExists: An account with this email exists — try signing in
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.notConfigured: Supabase not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL + NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong — please try again

form.heading: Invite someone
form.description: They'll get an email with a link to accept. Expires in 7 days.

pending.heading: Pending ({count})
pending.emptyAdmin: Send one above to get started.
pending.emptyMember: Ask an admin to invite new members.

invites.emailSubject: You're invited to join a Second Star Technologies workspace
invites.emailBody: {inviter} invited you to join their workspace as {role}.
invites.emailExpiry: Link expires in 7 days. If the button doesn't work:

errors.onlyAdmins: Only owners, admins, and developers can invite.
errors.pendingExists: A pending invite already exists for this email.

sheet.title: Pick a design theme
sheet.description: Eight fully-realized themes. Your choice applies instantly across every page — no reload, no signup. We'll remember it on this device.
sheet.appearanceSubtitle: Pick a look for your workspace. Applies instantly everywhere.
sheet.upsell: Like what you see? Create an account to sync themes across all your devices.

meta.title: Community — the production teams building on Second Star
meta.description: The festivals, tours, agencies, and fabrication shops running their production on ATLVS, GVTEWAY, and COMPVSS. Member stories, numbers, and what they actually ship.

hero.title: Production teams, building in public.
hero.subtitle: The festivals, tours, agencies, and fabrication shops running their shows on Second Star Technologies. Real workflows. Real numbers. Real receipts.

stories.heading: Member stories
stories.subtitle: What they were running before, what they switched, what measurably improved.

join.title: Your team, here.
join.body: Shipping real shows on Second Star Technologies? We're always looking to document new member stories. A short interview, anonymized numbers, your words.

finalCta.title: Be the next story
finalCta.subtitle: Start free. Ship a show. We'll talk afterward.

rate.tooMany: Too many requests — please try again shortly

errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this
errors.offline: You're offline — queued actions will sync when you reconnect
